name: Coconut Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve creamed coconut in hot water.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to a blender and pulse until well blended.
3. Marinate peeled shrimp (optionally deveined) in this mixture for at least 30 minutes.
4. Skewer the shrimp and grill over medium flame for about 5 to 6 minutes, turning frequently and basting with marinade.
